title: Bitcoin tops $60K amid Fed inflation talks: Is bull trap or $65K next?
summary: Bitcoin rallied above $60,000 despite Federal Reserve rate hike fears and steady outflows from the BTC spot ETFs. Is the rally a bull trap?

title: Robinhood rolls out public blockchain, plans crypto trading for UK residents
summary: The company announced a suite of DeFi products, plans for launching crypto trading in the UK and its public mainnet after months of testing.

title: Cboe Seeks to List Prediction Market Type Options on Earnings Metrics
summary: Cboe Global Markets Inc. is seeking US regulatory approval to list all-or-nothing options tied to corporate earnings results, allowing traders to wager on figures ranging from SpaceX revenue and Nvidia data-center sales to JPMorgan Chase & Co.’s credit-loss provisions.

title: Lenders to Clearlake and TA-Backed Tungsten Sign Debt Pact
summary: Lenders to Tungsten Automation have signed a pact agreeing to work together on a potential debt restructuring following a steep slide in the software company’s debt prices, according to people familiar with the matter.

Bitcoin price climbed back above $60,000 on Wednesday, lifting Bitcoin treasury stocks, with Strategy (MSTR) and Strive (ASST) surging more than 10% intraday.

title: Robinhood Launches 'AI-Native' Ethereum Layer-2 Network, Tokenized Stock Trading
summary: Brokerage and crypto exchange Robinhood opened the public mainnet for its Arbitrum-powered Ethereum layer-2 network on Wednesday.

title: Venice AI Valued at $1 Billion as Erik Voorhees Makes the Case for Private ChatGPT Rivals
summary: Venice reached a $1 billion valuation as founder Erik Voorhees argued AI companies should protect users' conversations.

title: Trump-backed American Bitcoin sets 1-for-15 reverse stock split in bid to maintain Nasdaq listing
summary: American Bitcoin's reverse split will reduce outstanding shares from roughly 1.09 billion to about 73 million.

title: ‘We desperately need legislation that includes an agreement on ethics:’ Trump financial filing adds urgency to crypto bill negotiations
summary: Trump's financial disclosure, revealing millions in crypto-related income, is adding urgency to write ethics restrictions into a crypto bill.
